title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sports Authority India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
